case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. HUGO LEONEL LOPEZ CAAL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED DEC-23-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAAL, HUGO LEONEL LOPEZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2020 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,741.44 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAAL, HUGO LEONEL LOPEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAAL, HUGO LEONEL LOPEZ $1,741.44 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,841.44 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HUGO LEONEL LOPEZ CAAL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
